summary: Iteration 90: CJ Dropshipping integration fully tested and verified. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (1 skipped due to fixture). Frontend: All features working correctly. CJ Sourcing page loads at /cj-sourcing with search, product cards, detail modal, import functionality, and pagination. Imported products display 'Sourced from CJ Dropshipping' badge on product detail page.
passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/cj/search requires auth (401 without)
BACKEND: GET /api/cj/search?q=phone+case returns products with cj_pid, product_name, sell_price, image_url, category, stock_status
BACKEND: GET /api/cj/search validates required query parameter
BACKEND: GET /api/cj/search supports pagination (page, page_size)
BACKEND: GET /api/cj/product/{pid} requires auth (401 without)
BACKEND: GET /api/cj/product/{pid} returns 404 for invalid PID
BACKEND: POST /api/cj/import/{pid} requires auth (401 without)
BACKEND: POST /api/cj/import/{pid} creates product with launch_score
BACKEND: POST /api/cj/import/{pid} handles duplicate imports (already_existed=true)
BACKEND: GET /api/cj/categories requires auth (401 without)
BACKEND: GET /api/cj/categories returns categories list
BACKEND: Imported products have data_source='cj_dropshipping' and cj_pid field
FRONTEND: Product Sourcing nav link in sidebar navigates to /cj-sourcing
FRONTEND: CJ Sourcing page loads with search input, search button, feature cards
FRONTEND: 6 quick search suggestions displayed: LED strip lights, phone case, yoga mat, kitchen gadget, pet toy, wireless earbuds
FRONTEND: 3 feature cards: Real Suppliers, One-Click Import, Live Data
FRONTEND: Search returns products (29,556 for 'phone case')
FRONTEND: Product cards display: name, image, category, stock status, supplier cost, est. retail, margin %
FRONTEND: Product cards have Import and Details buttons
FRONTEND: Product detail modal opens with image gallery, thumbnails, name, category, pricing grid, variants, description
FRONTEND: Modal import button works and redirects to product detail page
FRONTEND: Pagination controls appear for >20 results (Prev/Next buttons)
FRONTEND: Imported products show 'Sourced from CJ Dropshipping' badge on product detail page
FRONTEND: Product detail page shows 7-Signal Launch Score for imported CJ products

verified_features.verification: Page loads with all UI elements, protected by authentication

verified_features.feature: Sidebar navigation includes Product Sourcing link
verified_features.verification: Nav item with data-testid='nav-product-sourcing' routes to /cj-sourcing
Returns products array with correct fields, total count, pagination
Returns full product with variants and properties
Creates product in database with launch_score, handles duplicates
Modal shows image gallery, pricing, variants, description, import button

verified_features.feature: CJ Dropshipping badge on product detail
verified_features.verification: Badge with data-testid='cj-source-badge' shows for CJ-sourced products

critical_code_review_comments: CJ API token caching implemented in /tmp/cj_api_token.json to survive backend restarts
Rate limit handling with 2-second delays between requests recommended
Product import correctly calculates launch_score using calculate_launch_score function
ProductDetailPage properly checks data_source === 'cj_dropshipping' for badge display
seed_data_creation: CJ products imported during testing remain in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 90: CJ Dropshipping integration fully functional. (1) /cj-sourcing page with search, product cards, detail modal, import. (2) Backend APIs at /api/cj/search, /api/cj/product/{pid}, /api/cj/import/{pid}, /api/cj/categories all working. (3) CJ API has strict rate limits (1 req/sec) - token cached to file. (4) Imported products show 'Sourced from CJ Dropshipping' badge. (5) Pagination works for >20 results.
